characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, light brown complexion, dark hair tied back with some loose strands. She has dark eyes and red nail polish.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey or black long-sleeved top with a buttoned neckline.
characters.demeanor: Engaged, slightly hesitant at first, then surprised and convinced.

characters.appearance: Animated 3D avatar of a young female with bright red, wavy hair and green eyes.

scenes.supernova_script:
B says: क्या आप English बोलती हैं? [Do you speak English?]
A says: Uh, थोड़ी-थोड़ी, Tarzan style. [Uh, a little bit, Tarzan style.]
B says: Can you at least say your name? [Can you at least say your name?]
A says: My name is Jenny. [My name is Jenny.]
B says: Nice. Where are you from? [Nice. Where are you from?]
A says: I am France. [I am France.]
B says: आपने कहा "I am France." Close though! Try: "I am from France." [You said "I am France." Close though! Try: "I am from France."]
A says: Okay, I am from France. I'm France... No... wait, I am from France. [Okay, I am from France. I'm France... No... wait, I am from France.]
B says: There you go! [There you go!]
A says: Hey, मैं अपनी English कैसे improve करूँगी? [Hey, how am I going to improve my English?]
B says: Daily conversation practice बहुत ज़रूरी है. [Daily conversation practice is very important.]
A says: But मेरी इतनी ख़राब English के साथ मैं किससे बात करूँगी? [But who am I going to speak with this bad English?]
B says: मेरे साथ, of course! [With me, of course!]
A says: तुम्हारे साथ? [With you?]
B says: Supernova के AI English teachers के बारे में नहीं सुना? आप बिना किसी को bore किए जितनी चाहें ग़लतियाँ कर सकती हैं. [Haven't you heard of Supernova's AI English teachers? You can make as many mistakes as you want without boring anyone.]
A says: Wait, ये तो सच में काम कर सकता है. तुमने मुझे दो seconds में कुछ सिखा दिया. [Wait, that could actually work. You just taught me something in two seconds.]
B says: हम सिर्फ़ रटने वाले apps की तरह नहीं हैं. Supernova download करो और ख़ुद देखो. [We're not like those rote-learning apps. Download Supernova and see for yourself.]
A says: Oh, you know what, fair enough. मैं अभी Supernova download कर रही हूँ! Let's go. [Oh, you know what, fair enough. I'm downloading Supernova right now! Let's go.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, slightly humorous English mistake.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's gentle correction in real-time.
- Addresses the core user anxiety: "Who will I practice with if my English is bad?"
- Positions the AI tutor as a safe, non-judgmental space for practice.

- Shows brand logo and app store availability.
